evals.prompt: Run the delegator eval loop - I want to check if the --tools fix is still working correctly after the latest changes
evals.expected_output: Builds bramble, runs both simple and complex test prompts via bramble delegator, inspects JSONL logs to verify delegator has exactly 3 MCP tools, checks all 8 output criteria, produces structured eval summary with pass/fail verdict

evals.prompt: Test the delegator with a complex multi-step task and find any usability gaps
evals.expected_output: Runs test prompts, analyzes output against the 8-point checklist, compiles structured findings with severity/root-cause, spawns plan agents for any gaps, spawns fix agents, rebuilds, re-tests, produces round-by-round summary

evals.prompt: I just made changes to delegator_runner.go - run the delegator eval loop to make sure nothing is broken
evals.expected_output: Builds binary, runs tests, checks all 8 criteria plus regression table, flags any regressions in tool restriction/output quality/cost, produces eval summary with verdict
